subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaboration. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call.

Would any of the following slots work for you?

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm unable to share direct contact information for our CTO or VP of Engineering. However, I'd be glad to facilitate the appropriate introductions during our call once we've established the scope of our potential collaboration.

Please let me know which time slot works best, and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Best regards
